vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has undergone a complete collapse of its botanical components. Starting from a state where minimal growth was present, the specimens have either been removed or have perished entirely. The current state is characterized by empty soil surfaces and the introduction of non-botanical artifacts (spoon, cylinder), suggesting the desk is no longer functioning as a plant habitat.
